description: Alert when a pool health value is DEGRADED.

message: Pool health is offline or removed
description: Alert when a pool health value is OFFLINE or REMOVED.
Critical alert when a pool health value is FAULTED.
Critical alert when a pool health value is UNKNOWN.

message: Pool root read errors reached warning threshold
normal_message: Pool root read errors returned below warning threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root read errors are greater than or equal to 50.

message: Pool root read errors reached error threshold
normal_message: Pool root read errors returned below error threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root read errors are greater than or equal to 100.

message: Pool root write errors reached warning threshold
normal_message: Pool root write errors returned below warning threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root write errors are greater than or equal to 50.

message: Pool root write errors reached error threshold
normal_message: Pool root write errors returned below error threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root write errors are greater than or equal to 100.

message: Pool root checksum errors reached warning threshold
normal_message: Pool root checksum errors returned below warning threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root checksum errors are greater than or equal to 50.

message: Pool root checksum errors reached error threshold
normal_message: Pool root checksum errors returned below error threshold
description: Alert when per-pool root checksum errors are greater than or equal to 100.
